\tzpentry{ID4869}{Permittivity Expansion}
\paragraph{Canonical Statement.}
ID4869 introduces Permittivity Expansion as a source-extracted canonical equation candidate. The equation is promoted from the Tier A equation-source intake and remains pending source-context expansion, duplicate review against the earlier TZPID corpus, Wolfram normalization, symbol-key enrichment, and derivation/proof-lane construction.
\paragraph{Canonical Equation.}
\[
$\\min \\sum_{i,j} d_H(x_i, x_j) \\text{ subject to } P_{err} < \\epsilon$
\]
